ext_desc.message: A customizable new tab with visual bookmarks, folders, search, thumbnails, themes, and optional Chrome Sync.

favicon_size_individual_note.message: Leave empty to use the global thumbnail image size.

download_favicons_by_default.message: Download favicons from websites by default

download_favicons_by_default_note.message: When a favicon thumbnail is missing locally, download it in the background when the start page opens.

favicon_size_note.message: Default image size for all thumbnail types. Individual tile settings take priority.

thumbnail_url_note.message: The image is cached locally and checked for updates periodically.

notice_thumbnail_url_failed.message: Failed to download the thumbnail from URL

url_field_tip.message: Enter a URL, or leave this field empty to create a folder.

confirm_delete_images.message: Are you sure? All local thumbnails will be deleted.

confirm_clear_local_cache.message: Are you sure? All temporary local data will be deleted. Settings and local images will be preserved.

confirm_delete_folder.message: Delete this folder and everything inside it?

confirm_restore_default_settings.message: Reset only local settings to defaults and disable synchronization? Synchronized data on the server will be preserved.

confirm_clear_sync_settings.message: Delete synchronized settings from the server and disable synchronization? Local settings, images, and cache will be preserved.

confirm_sync_remote_settings.message:
Synchronized settings already exist.
Replace the current local settings with the synchronized version?

notice_cant_find_id.message: Folder not found. It may not be available in this Chrome profile.

notice_sync_settings_cleared.message: Synchronized server data deleted; synchronization disabled

alert_file_type_fail_type.message:
Unsupported file type
Allowed file type: $type$

alert_file_type_fail_size.message: File is too large. Maximum size: $filesize$ MB

not_found_text.message: Folder not found. It may have been moved or deleted, or your bookmarks may not be synchronized on this device.

thumbnails_setting_description.message: Settings in this section apply to all supported thumbnail sources: website screenshots, image URLs, and favicons. Locally uploaded images are never replaced automatically.

dial_background_color_note.message: Uses the current theme color until a custom color is selected.

disable_main_page_scroll.message: Disable scrolling on the main page

disable_main_page_scroll_description.message: Hides the scrollbar and prevents scrolling outside bookmark search results.

default_folder_sync_note.message: Sync is enabled. This setting is saved to Chrome Sync.

default_folder_local_note.message: Sync is disabled. This setting is saved on this device.

background_bing_text.message: Use the daily photo featured on the Bing homepage as the StartGrid background.

bing_permission_toast.message: Bing Image of the Day requires access to bing.com. Select it on the settings page and confirm the permission request.

background_local_video_note.message: A local background can be an image or an MP4 video. Video plays muted and loops automatically.

snow_mode_winter.message: In winter — December 1 through the last day of February

show_toolbar.message: Show the search bar and folder picker

show_favicon.message: Show the favicon next to the title

open_bookmarks_newtab.message: Open bookmarks in a new tab

open_search_newtab.message: Open search in a new tab

auto_generate_thumbnail.message: Automatically add a favicon to new bookmarks

clear_background_locals.message: Delete all locally stored thumbnail images

reset_local_default_description.message: Resets only local settings and disables synchronization. Synchronized server data is not deleted.

reset_quick_settings_description.message: Restores only the settings shown in this menu to the extension defaults.

confirm_reset_quick_settings.message: Reset quick settings to the extension defaults?

reset_sync_text.message: Remove synced settings from Chrome Sync

reset_sync_description.message: Deletes only synchronized settings from the server and disables synchronization. Local settings, images, and cache are preserved.

thumbnails_update_warn.message: Each thumbnail is refreshed from its selected source: website, image URL, or favicon. Locally uploaded images are preserved. Updating can affect performance.

thumbnails_auto_refresh_note.message: Checks and refreshes outdated thumbnails when the home page opens

thumbnails_auto_refresh_interval_note.message: Time between thumbnail refreshes, from 1 hour to 7 days

folder_preview_description.message: Shows thumbnails from four randomly selected sites in the folder instead of a folder icon or custom image.

backup_settings_description.message: Backs up extension settings only; bookmarks and images are not included.

import_settings_failed.message: Could not read the settings file

toggle_clipboard_access_description.message: Allows the extension to read data from the clipboard to upload a bookmark thumbnail. The 'Upload from clipboard' action will become available in the bookmark editing window. If you're concerned about this permission, simply don't enable it.

thumbnails_update_delay_note.message: Increase the delay for websites that need more time to finish loading.

close_tab_after_adding_bookmark.message: Close the tab after adding it to bookmarks

close_tab_after_adding_bookmark_note.message: Applies only when a bookmark is added from the context menu.

search_failed.message: Could not search bookmarks. Please try again.

sync_quota_exceeded.message: Chrome Sync storage limit exceeded ($used$ of $limit$). The latest changes could not be synchronized and remain on this device. Reduce the synchronized settings.

show_back_column.message: Show the Back tile inside folders

search_results_display_folder_path.message: Full folder path on the tile

move_to_start.message: Move new bookmarks to the top of their folder

usage_tiebreaker.message: When usage is equal, sort by

show_home_folders.message: Show folders on the home page

bookmarks_sorting_warning.message: Drag-and-drop ordering is unavailable while automatic sorting is enabled.

search_suggestions_permission_tooltip.message: Allow access to the selected suggestion service and the Google fallback

toggle_selected_bookmarks_popup.message: Show or hide selected bookmark actions

incognito_access_note.message: Allow StartGrid to run in incognito mode before using this action.

notice_host_permissions.message: Creating website thumbnails requires permission to access the selected websites.

host_permissions_info.message:
StartGrid needs website access only when it creates a screenshot for a bookmark thumbnail. It does not collect or track your browsing data. While capturing a screenshot, StartGrid temporarily hides the website scrollbar in a separate window.

You can decline this optional permission and use every feature except website screenshots. Chrome asks for access when you first create a website screenshot. You can change the permission later in Chrome's extension settings. The source code is available on GitHub.

search_settings_description.message: Choose the default search engine and configure which engines appear in the search menu.

search_engines_description.message: Enable, configure, reorder, or remove search engines. The list can contain up to 20 engines in total.

search_engine_url_note.message: Use {query} where the encoded query should be inserted. A custom suggestion URL is optional; Google suggestions are used when it is empty.

search_suggestion_invalid_url.message: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS suggestion URL containing {query}, or leave the field empty.

search_engine_invalid_url.message: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL containing {query}.

search_engine_at_least_one.message: At least one search engine must remain enabled.

keyboard_shortcuts_description.message: Configure keyboard shortcuts for actions on the StartGrid new tab page.

keyboard_shortcuts_note.message: Select a shortcut and press the new key combination. Press Escape to cancel. Press Backspace or Delete to remove the shortcut. Shortcuts work only on the StartGrid page.

shortcut_conflict.message: This shortcut is already assigned to another action.

shortcut_invalid.message: Press a non-reserved key. Escape and Tab cannot be assigned.

shortcut_modifier_invalid.message: Assign Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or Meta for selecting multiple bookmarks.

settings_group_reset_description.message: These actions require confirmation and can change or remove saved settings.
